content:
- Business Analysis: collected requirements from stakeholders to translate them in technical specifications ; collaborated with development teams to design IT solutions ; created detailed technical documentation
- Web Development: created Figma mockups and participated in the development of microservices for Kenja Rooms 4 (JavaScript, React)
- Testing: documented testing procedures for web and mobile ; built automated tests using Playwright ; handled automated and manual tests
- Produced financial communication materials for “La Française Real Estate Managers” (quarter and annual reports for 21 real estate investment funds - around 100,000 copies)
